prompt: Before we build anything, do your homework from the knowledge base and play it back to me. Two subsystems: (1) Instancing — how is Geo COMP instancing actually set up: the real parameter names for switching instancing on, pointing at the data source, and the per-instance translate channels. (2) Audio — playing an audio file and getting band-ish levels as CHOP channels: real operator and parameter names, with an example if one exists. Get it from the knowledge base, not from memory — cite what you looked up. If the KB is missing any piece, say so explicitly rather than papering over it. Do NOT build anything.
